articles.author: Abner Li
articles.title: Gemini app starts rolling out Personal Intelligence globally - 9to5Google
articles.description: After the US launch, Google is bringing Personal Intelligence to Gemini users around the world (excluding Europe).
articles.content:
After the US launch, Google is bringing Personal Intelligence to Gemini users around the world (excluding Europe).
